name: id_at_minimum_boundary
description: Verify that id accepts the minimum valid value of 1 without rejection.

name: username_at_length_boundaries
description: Test username at exact minLength (3) and maxLength (50) boundary values.

name: password_below_minimum_length
description: Verify that password with length 5 (below minLength of 6) is rejected.

name: email_special_characters_in_local_part
description: Test email format validation with special characters like plus signs and dots.

name: missing_required_versus_null_fields
description: Verify different behavior when required fields are null vs completely omitted from request body.
input_hint: username = null vs no username key present

name: missing_both_credentials
description: Both username and password parameters are omitted from the request, testing if the API handles completely missing credentials gracefully.

name: extremely_long_username
description: Username parameter contains an extremely long string (e.g., 10000+ characters) to test for buffer overflow or input validation limits.

name: special_characters_in_credentials
description: Username and password contain SQL injection, script injection, or special characters (e.g., ', ", <, >, &, %) to test encoding and sanitization.

name: null_string_values
description: Username and/or password parameters are set to literal 'null' strings or empty strings to test null-handling vs missing parameter distinction.

name: concurrent_login_requests
description: Multiple simultaneous login requests with the same credentials are sent to test for race conditions, session conflicts, or token collision.
input_hint: Send 100+ concurrent GET requests with identical valid credentials

name: concurrent_logout_requests_same_session
description: Multiple simultaneous logout requests from the same session should be handled atomically to prevent race conditions or double-logout errors.
input_hint: Send 5-10 parallel GET requests with identical session token within milliseconds

name: logout_with_expired_token
description: Attempting to logout with an already-expired authentication token should return appropriate error instead of 200 OK.
input_hint: Use token with expiration timestamp in the past

name: logout_with_invalid_token_format
description: Logout with malformed or corrupted token should fail gracefully rather than cause server errors.
input_hint: Send token with special characters, extremely long string (10000+ chars), or binary data

name: logout_without_authentication_header
description: Logout request missing authentication header entirely should be rejected, not treated as successful.

name: logout_already_logged_out_session
description: Attempting to logout a session that was already logged out should handle idempotency correctly.
input_hint: Call logout endpoint twice sequentially with same valid token

name: extremely_long_username_boundary
description: Test with a username exceeding maximum allowed length to verify proper rejection or truncation behavior.

name: special_characters_in_username
description: Test with special characters like <, >, &, quotes, and unicode characters to verify proper escaping and validation.

name: empty_string_username
description: Test with an empty string as username to verify the API rejects it or handles it as invalid input.

name: concurrent_requests_same_user
description: Test multiple simultaneous requests for the same username to verify thread-safety and absence of race conditions.
input_hint: 10+ concurrent GET requests with identical username parameter

name: case_sensitivity_boundary
description: Test if username lookup is case-sensitive by requesting 'John', 'john', and 'JOHN' separately.
input_hint: Same username with different case variations

name: username_minimum_length_boundary
description: Test username with exactly 3 characters (minLength boundary) to verify minimum constraint is inclusive.

name: username_maximum_length_boundary
description: Test username with exactly 50 characters (maxLength boundary) to verify maximum constraint is inclusive.

name: password_minimum_length_violation
description: Test password with 5 characters (below minLength:6) to verify validation rejects undersized passwords.

name: id_zero_and_negative_boundary
description: Test id with 0 and negative values to verify minimum:1 constraint is enforced.

name: special_characters_in_string_fields
description: Test firstName, lastName, and username with SQL injection, script tags, and unicode characters to verify input sanitization.
input_hint: firstName = "<script>alert(1)</script>" or username = "admin'; DROP TABLE users;--"

name: delete_user_with_sql_injection_payload
description: Verify the API properly sanitizes username parameter to prevent SQL injection attacks.

name: delete_user_with_extremely_long_username
description: Test behavior when username exceeds maximum length constraints (e.g., 10000+ characters).

name: delete_user_with_url_encoded_special_chars
description: Verify handling of special characters like %, /, &, ? that require URL encoding in path parameters.

name: delete_nonexistent_user_returns_404
description: Confirm the API returns proper 404 status when attempting to delete a user that does not exist.

name: concurrent_delete_requests_same_user
description: Test race condition behavior when two delete requests target the same user simultaneously.
input_hint: Send 2+ concurrent DELETE requests with identical username parameter
